title: saxifraga nudicaulis subsp. vaginalis
intro: Saxifraga nudicaulis subsp. vaginalis, also known as the woodland saxifrage, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating urinary tract infections and skin issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support kidney function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The woodland saxifrage can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
